title: Status change when assigning a team
excerpt:
I would like for a status column to change when a team is assigned to an ‘assignee’ column. At the moment, a status can change if you assign a single person, however, you cannot do this for a group.

posts.author: polina.kurotskina (Polina Kurotskina)
posts.cookedHtml:
I would like for a status column to change when a team is assigned to an ‘assignee’ column. At the moment, a status can change if you assign a single person, however, you cannot do this for a group.
This would be really great to have where departments are logged to tickets, not individuals, and those departments could be missing items in their board.
